ideals: I addressed challenges with patience, wisdom, or experience
I expressed my heritage, background, or beliefs through my actions
I defused a potentially violent situation
system.secondWind: You can regain all effort when you manage to avoid confrontation or violence through your actions.

specialAbility.name: Special Ability
specialAbility.effect: At the start of a session, choose another character to watch over. The first time they would take a burden, you can take it instead if you have one free. If you do, regain all effort and clear all strain, and mark +1 xp.

powers.name: Parable
powers.description: Twice a session, ask the GM about any path of action. The GM answers with 'This is the path of ____' using an animal, plant, or natural element. Gain +1d when next acting on the answer.

powers.name: Pacifist
powers.description: If you leave a scene of violence without harming anyone, heal 1 strain and regain 1 effort.

powers.name: Long Memory
powers.description: Gain +1d on rolls about events more than ten years ago. At chapter III, if in your lifetime, can't fail the roll (treat 1-3 as 4+).

powers.name: Been Around
powers.description: Nobody younger than you can harm, restrain, or touch you unless you let them or they draw a weapon. Ignores chapter.

powers.name: Spinner of Tales
powers.description: You get a 12 segment ambition clock to tell a story from your past. When complete, a character of your choice can improve an action by 1. Each character can only benefit once.

powers.name: Pillar of Rock
powers.description: Until you use violence or coerce someone in a session, reduce all strain from other people by 1, minimum 1.

powers.name: Saltbelly
powers.description: Gain +1d for the rest of the session against anyone that shares a meal, drink, or game of skill with you.

powers.name: Mentor
powers.description: Forgo your own ambitions to help someone else with theirs. They tick 1 more segment and gain +1d.

powers.name: Reputation
powers.description: When entering a new populated area, decide people have heard of you. Get +1d social interactions, but you're easy to find. Works on: I town. II city or village. III: Anywhere.

powers.name: The Mountain
powers.description: 1/session - Increase the effect of your next Endure action to superpowered.

powers.name: Gambit of Tsumi
powers.description: Take a power from another Bond.

gearKits.name: Weathered Adventurer's Kit
items: Rusted lantern, well-worn pack, flat bedroll, sturdy rope, flint and arkentech firestarter, thick journal, extra rations, sturdy cooking pot, utility knife, sleeping bag

gearKits.name: Veteran's Kit
items: Broken famous weapon, old badge of rank, weapon care kit, painful memento, the most solid boots in the world, thick cloak, wound care knowledge

gearKits.name: Hermit's Kit
items: Herbal medicine, icon of a magic or religious order, heavy walking stave, light pack, excellent hat, foraging knowledge

gearKits.name: Nostalgic Kit
items: Memories of the local area from long ago, a useful story, a safe place nearby, an excellent sense of direction
